property.name: action-label
property.value: Response Curve (For Inversion) ↓ Press to Invert

property.name: action-label
property.value: Response Curve (For Inversion) ↓↓↓ Press to Invert

property.name: action-label
property.value: L-PINKY "Modifier | Modifier" Temporary push to Modifier while held (already in Modifier; refreshes the hold).

property.name: action-label
property.value: L30.press "Reset Freelook | Camera" Holds F4 + vJoy button 80 for 0.5s to recenter.

property.name: action-label
property.value: L-PINKY "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: action-label
property.value: L-PINKY "Modifier | Modifier" Hold-only Modifier mode (chord layer). Reverts on release.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Camera Tilt (Mouse Y) | Camera" Routed to mouse Y so you can free-look up/down while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: "Camera Pan (Mouse X) | Camera" Routed to mouse X so you can free-look left/right while flying in 3rd person.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Flat plateau curve to suppress potential idle-axis drift on the mouse X free-look axis.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Response Curve (For Inversion) ↓ Press to Invert

property.name: action-label
property.value: R-stick X axis curve at JG layer. Any inversion happens here, not in SC's invert menu.

property.name: action-label
property.value: R-stick Y axis curve at JG layer. Any inversion happens here, not in SC's invert menu.

property.name: action-label
property.value: R-stick axis 6 curve at JG layer. Any inversion happens here, not in SC's invert menu.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Throttle Y inverted at the JG layer here -- skips SC's in-game invert toggle.

property.name: description
property.value: Tap toggles your ship lights (or flashlight on foot). Hold about half a second to toggle Light Amplification (night vision); it runs through a macro because Star Citizen only accepts a quick tap on that bind.

property.name: description
property.value: Turn the knob to this detent for NAV master mode (quantum and cruise flight). It moves Joystick Gremlin to its NAV layer and sets NAV in-game.

property.name: description
property.value: Turn the knob here for SCM master mode (normal combat and maneuvering flight). It moves Joystick Gremlin to its SCM layer and sets SCM in-game.

property.name: description
property.value: A pass-through detent for moving out of Auxiliary back toward SCM. Don't park here; Joystick Gremlin can't cycle directly into Aux, so this slot just lets the knob travel through without sticking.

property.name: description
property.value: Turn the knob here to set Auxiliary master mode for mining and salvage. It moves Joystick Gremlin to its Aux layer and arms your mining/salvage tools in-game.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: Routed to mouse Y so you can free-look up and down in 3rd-person flight. The flat center curve suppresses idle stick drift so the camera holds still.

property.name: description
property.value: If your stick reports the 30-degree hat as a POV hat instead of four buttons, this converts it to button presses so the hat directions still work - nothing for you to set up.

property.name: description
property.value: If your stick reports the 30-degree hat as a POV hat instead of four buttons, this converts it to button presses so the hat directions still work - nothing for you to set up.

property.name: description
property.value: In Modifier mode the left mini-stick acts as four buttons - push it to toggle power to your weapons, shields, thrusters, and overall systems.

property.name: description
property.value: In Modifier mode the left mini-stick acts as four buttons - push it to toggle power to your weapons, shields, thrusters, and overall systems.

property.name: description
property.value: Hold the pinky lever to switch on the Modifier layer, a temporary shift that gives most buttons a second function while held. Release to return. Nothing is sent to the game; it only changes Joystick Gremlin's layer.

property.name: description
property.value: Tap resets the bomb-alignment HUD range. Hold recenters freelook by holding F4 + the freelook vJoy button for 0.5s, since Star Citizen won't let you bind freelook recenter to a stick button.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: Tap cycles your master mode (or toggles mining-laser type while mining); hold jumps straight to NAV. It also switches Joystick Gremlin's active layer to match.

property.name: description
property.value: Routed to mouse X so you can free-look left and right in 3rd-person flight. The flat center curve suppresses idle stick drift so the camera holds still.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: A flat 1:1 response curve sits on this axis only so you can reverse its direction with Joystick Gremlin's Invert Curve button if your hardware reads it backwards. No other effect.

property.name: description
property.value: In Modifier mode the right mini-stick acts as four buttons - push it to pin targets and raise individual shield faces (left, right, front, back).

property.name: description
property.value: In Modifier mode the right mini-stick acts as four buttons - push it to pin targets and raise individual shield faces (left, right, front, back).

property.name: description
property.value: If your stick reports the 30-degree hat as a POV hat instead of four buttons, this converts it to button presses so the hat directions still work - nothing for you to set up.

property.name: action-label
property.value: Axis to Mouse Axis (3rd Person Freelook)

property.name: action-label
property.value: Tempo (Tap/Hold) Reset Bomb Range / Reset Freelook

property.name: action-label
property.value: Axis to Mouse Axis (3rd Person Freelook)

property.name: value
property.value: E:\06. Dev Projects\Subs-Curated-Bindings\[Enhanced] Dual VKB Gladiator NXT\Audio Files\Hal 9000
